title: Fetch feral hosting reset link from ProtonMail

log.context: Fetch feral hosting reset link from ProtonMail

The feralhosting.com password reset link from the "Recover account request" email is:

**https://www.feralhosting.com/recover/ZUYY6NO4Q2ZTF4XQF3EWDNOLKYE5M4IQCYNYSE24PBM3FDYQ4LNA====**

That URL appeared twice in the email body (likely plain-text and HTML versions of the same link). The third URL is just a tracking pixel from feralhosting's email system, not the reset link.
